verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a short concrete value ('57'), which is easy to compare against
The problem is a structured geometry item with explicit givens, so a derived numeric result is in principle checkable
Verification is somewhat limited by heavy diagram dependence, so the score is high but not maximal
